hooks.command: git fetch --all --prune --quiet 2>/dev/null; branch=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null); behind=$(git rev-list --count HEAD..origin/main 2>/dev/null || echo 0); ahead=$(git rev-list --count origin/main..HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo 0); upstream=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref --symbolic-full-name @{u} 2>/dev/null || echo none); upstream_gone=$(git for-each-ref --format='%(upstream:track)' "refs/heads/$branch" 2>/dev/null | grep -c gone); stash=$(git stash list 2>/dev/null | wc -l); printf '[git-sync] branch=%s behind_main=%s ahead_main=%s upstream=%s upstream_gone=%s stash=%s\n' "$branch" "$behind" "$ahead" "$upstream" "$upstream_gone" "$stash"; if [ "$behind" -gt 0 ] && [ "$branch" != "main" ]; then echo "[git-sync] WARNING: main has $behind new commits — consider rebase before continuing"; fi; if [ "$upstream_gone" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[git-sync] WARNING: upstream branch deleted on remote — likely already merged"; fi

node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8')); const f=d.tool_response?.filePath || d.tool_input?.file_path || ''; if(f) console.log(f);" | { read -r f; [ -n "$f" ] && npx prettier --write --ignore-unknown "$f" 2>/dev/null || true; }
